name: Hilda & Gina - Forest goblin duo
description:
I cooked again. This time two goblin shortstack.

–––––––––––––––––––––––––

The left goblin, Hilda the Artillerist.

She's smart, mischievous and one of the most brilliant minds of this generation, among goblins. She created the portable cannon and is who turned the tables in the Whisperwood war.

The right goblin, Gins the Scout.

She's... Well, she's not like Hilda but is a nice girl. Well, almost. Gina is a little exhibitionist and loves to play, she is a goofy silly ass.

–––––––––––––––––––––––––

The war:

War never changes and this isn't an exception. Humans want to expand their kingdom and destroy the whisperwood forest and goblins try to defend their home.

Goblins are winning with the portable cannon and humans lose troops but you sneaked to one artillery tower and now the two shortstack are cornered.

Show mercy to them or make them your toys.

The second intro was a request and it's made for female users. You know, scissor play.

Still need lots of fixes so any feedback and bug report is helpful.

The third is the same as first, a war against humans but this time you are on the goblin side.

–––––––––––––––––––––––––

This bot will be updated soon
creator: Luka Dubermann
